title: Minetology
description: Dragons, Aether and many more are now in Minecraft, Can you still beat it?
body:
# Introduction
Dragons, Ghosts, Sculk & Aether Dimensions and many more exists in this world\
You must Survive, becoming one with the Dragons, Hunting the myths or even becoming a Sculk Warrior!\
There is no Right or Wrong in this World, only different Paths to Power, Conquiste o Mundo!

### **WELCOME TO THE WORLD OF**
![Minetology Logo, a Moldy and Square Text.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2edfbd8877c449d67a090573516d6d2b13b70388.png)

## ***Why is this Modpack Archived?***

I Plan on Remaking this modpack from scratch, with a new name and everything,
Maybe on a Different Modloader. It will have a kinda different objective,
Probably going to delete this project, but dont worry! the next modpack will have a similar objective to this one, so for now. **Adeus! Até outra hora**

## **Paths to Power:**

**Dragon Lord** : Be one with the Dragons and tame them, to attack your enemies and become the Lord of the Dragons.

**Mythbusters** : Slay all Myths becoming stronger as the time passes, and finally, becoming a Myth.

**Sculk Warrior** : Battle against the Sculk Abberations and defeat them all, untill finally becoming the perfect warrior.

**Dimensional Conquest** : Dominate all dimensions and beat all the bosses in them, becoming the strongest in each and every dimension!

![4 Different Scenes : A Dragon, A Abandoned Structure, A Sculk Warrior and a Dimensional Conquest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de9e2ac3de367e3f587706da0d358447db1793a7.png)
_________
<details>
<summary>Misc</summary>

Basically you can use the Modpack in Content Creation and etc...

**BUT**

By downloading this Modpack, you agree that **You will not redistribute the project.** _Security Measures only_.\
